texto: A gentle Quaker hearing a strange noise in his house one night got up and discovered a burglar busily at work. He went and got his gun came back and stood quietly in the doorway. 'Friend ' he said 'I would do thee no harm for the world but thou standest where I am about to shoot.'
explicacao: Citação de James Hines sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “A gentle Quaker hearing a strange noise in his house one night got up and discovered a burglar bu…” articula reflexao, religion, gentle em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: A gentle Quaker hearing a strange noise in his house one night got up and discovered a burglar busily at work. He went and got his gun came back and stood quietly in the doorway. 'Friend ' he said 'I would do thee no harm for the world but thou standest where I am about to shoot.'
